meaning: n.仲裁人,裁判员v.仲裁,任裁判,作裁判
examples: He was the only National League umpire to wear an outside chest protector.
I still play football here, and sometimes I umpire here, so it's a great park.
The umpire climbed off his chair to check the mark and confirmed the call.
Exploding from the dugout, he had to be restrained from physically attacking the umpire.
